Failure Effect: User/Rider waits and retries and eventually gives up.
Mitigations: Diagnostics for Sensors, relays and switches

Failure Mode: Elevator Floor allignment at Stop is > threshold
Failure Effect: Rider/User may trip. Rider/User if in wheelchair may not be able to easily get out
Failure Causes: Issue with floor alignment control logic
Issue with floor proximity sensor resulting in elevator not able to allign properly
Mitigations: Diagnostics for Sensors, relays and switches

Failure Effect: User/Rider may get stuck and elevator motion in this case can be life threatning
Failure Causes: Obstruction detection and safety loop logic failure
Mitigations: Assuming simulatoin tests and field tests are in place, when such failure occurs, what is needed is data at that point to understand what system was perceiving. Then analyze what broke the system.
Add a redundant mechanical break to make system robust. Have diagnostics in place to detect failure of any mechanical break. Stop elevator operation when break failure is detected.

Failure Mode: Door fails to egress at max width
Failure Effect: User/Rider not able to get out of elevator
Mitigations: Door motor diagnostics - stuck, STB, STG etc
Sensor that detects door position failed. Need sensor diagnostics

Failure Mode: Door takes forever to open and close
Mitigations: Door motor diagnostics - Time to open, Time to close

Failure Mode: Elevator door fails to stop and reverse when obstruction is detected while closing
Failure Effect: User/Rider may get stuck and elevator motion in this case can be life threatning

Failure Mode: Door is stuck close with user/rider inside
Mitigations: Door motor diagnostics - stuck, STB, STG etc

Failure Mode: Elevator strikes overhead buffer or pit buffer.
Failure Effect: At high speed life threatning impact
Failure Causes: Elevator failing to read its location or there is some offset or error in location reader
Mitigations: Diagnostics to detect position offset or error

Failure Mode: Elevator initiates motion while doors are not fully locked.
Elevator drifts away from floor with doors open
Mitigations: Add a redundant mechanical break to make system robust. Have diagnostics in place to detect failure of any mechanical break. Stop elevator operation when break failure is detected.

Failure Effect: Elevator is stops abruptly and is inoperable. Rider is entraped.
Mitigations: System shall safely transit to safe state. In safe state, system shall use gravity deceleration or battery backup for safe rider exit

Failure Mode: Elevator gives jerk at start and stop
Failure Causes: Wear and tear of elevator motor electric braking
Mitigations: Design shall able to detect through diagnostics
